title: kdc signal
description: One claim from one source about one site. Append-only; conflicting signals coexist by design (signal > canon).

id.description: sig-YYYYMMDD-<slug>; must equal the filename stem.

site_id.description: Ref: data/sites/<id>.yml. Null while the site is an unmatched candidate.

site_hint.description: Free-text site identification when site_id is null (name + county as reported).

attribute.description: What the claim is about: status, capacity_mw, land_acres, investment_usd, operator, location, name, …

value.description: The claim, raw, as reported — no normalization here.

collected_by.description: Gnome name + run id, or console identifier.

confidence.description: Source-level trust for this single claim.
